title: DashboardFilter
description: A filter on a dashboard that allows users to dynamically change query parameters across multiple tiles simultaneously.

model.description: LookML model name for field_filter type

explore.description: LookML explore name for field_filter type

allow_multiple_values.description: Whether multiple values can be selected

required.description: Whether the filter must have a value

row.description: Row position of the filter in the filter bar

listens_to_filters.description: Other filters this filter listens to for cascading
